description_long: This is a large, antique book with a thick, ornately embossed brown leather cover featuring intricate floral and geometric patterns. The book is secured with two prominent brass clasps on the fore-edge, which add to its historical appearance. The pages are visibly aged, with a yellowed, slightly wavy texture, suggesting significant age and use. The spine is rounded and decorated with raised bands and gold-embossed text, further enhancing its classic look. There is a small area of wear or damage on the front cover, revealing a lighter patch. The overall craftsmanship and materials indicate this is a valuable, possibly rare, historical volume.
description: A large, antique book with an embossed brown leather cover, brass clasps, and aged, yellowed pages. The spine is decorated with gold text and raised bands.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the fore-edge, showing the thick, yellowed pages and the rounded spine with visible stitching.
description_view_1: The front cover is visible, displaying ornate embossing, two brass clasps, and a patch of wear in the upper right corner.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite fore-edge, again highlighting the thick pages and the edge of the cover with its detailed stitching.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, showing gold-embossed text, raised bands, and the continuation of the embossed leather pattern.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown leather with ornate embossed patterns and raised bands. Gold-embossed text is oriented horizontally, with a year also stamped in gold.
